validated_json.name: Commercial Schedule
validated_json.description: Commercial schedule for Silver Orbit Analytics covering Mined Form quantity 1 with stated annual amount and referenced standard SLA.

phases.description: Commercial schedule references product/service 'Mined Form'. Effective Date appears as 2075-02-02 on OCR, but pricing terms are largely unresolved. The packet notes the standard SLA applies but is not reproduced. Missing referenced schedules/exhibits remain unresolved. Payment note states fixed platform fees may be billed in advance while variable usage is billed in arrears.

pricings.description: Product / Service listed as 'Mined Form'. Commercial Annual value shown as $18,000,600, but this appears inconsistent/possibly OCR-corrupted and is not clearly a line-item price; retained as unresolved description only.

pricing.description: Commercial Annual: '$18,000,600' appears in OCR, but explicit pricing model, currency certainty, and line-item applicability are unclear.

extraction_notes.quote_or_span: The standard SLA applies, but the SLA schedule itself ia not reproduced in this.
Payment mote: Fixed platform fees may be billed in advanee while Variable usage is billed in arrearg.
